title: APP Peladas — Arquivos de Regras de Negócio
summary: Proposes a NestJS matches module with domain enums, entities, DTOs, business errors, repository contracts, rules services, and use-case code for Peladas.
notes: Strong SPEC signals (data models, service logic, use cases). Sections 8–10 and the intro are advisory/guide-style, not ADR/PRD user stories.
